facebook.caption:
898 reviews. 4.7 stars. On a noodle shop. On Trần Hưng Đạo.

Mì Tê - Artisan Noodles is not playing around. Locals rate it. Repeat visitors rate it. The bowls are handcrafted, the queue tells you everything you need to know before you even sit down.

Phu Quoc has no shortage of noodle spots. This one earned nearly 900 opinions and still sits at 4.7. That means almost nobody left disappointed.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
